title: Gitdunk's Mining Dimension
description: mod designed to mimic the ATM mining dimension
body:
An ATM like mining dimension for vanilla ores, probably a bit unbalanced.

The dimension is in layers, with each layer holding the respective ore types for that layer, nether ores for netherrack for example, the first version had the order of stone, netherrack, deepslate, but later versions will be stone, deepslate, netherrack.

To make the portal you need to craft the portal blocks (cracked stone bricks surrounding a diamond needing a minimum of 10) and assemble them like a nether portal, then you light it using a diamond pickaxe instead of a flint and steel.

uses kyrptonaught's [Custom Portal API](https://github.com/kyrptonaught/customportalapi) for the portal.

1.18.2 isn't popular on fabric anymore to my knowledge, and later versions have [JAMD (Just Another Mining Dimension)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jamd) that supported all three main mod loaders (Forge, NeoForge, and Fabric).

<s>any suggestions are welcome! do so from the link issues please. If I add it I'll credit you in the changelog.<s/>
scratch that, while I have the code still and can probably continue to work on this, I don't really see a reason to.
